name: Bad Blood
overview: A story that follows three generations of a rich Serbian Christian family in the 19th century in the north of the then Ottoman Empire in the city of Vranje, who are fighting for survival through various moral crises, facing decline. Forbidden love, intrigue, murder, arranged marriages, revenge, friendship and enmity between Serbs, Albanians and Turks and the endangered position of women at that time

trailers.title: NEČISTA KRV - SERIJA  |  BAD BLOOD - TV SHOW Official Trailer
